# RoboVentors

> Robotics education company for students 8–18. Three consecutive Avishkaar National gold medals. Hands-on courses and projects in robotics, electronics, AI, and aerospace.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of RoboVentors — programs, track record, and stats.
- [About](/about): Our story, timeline, and results.
- [Courses](/courses): Robotics Foundation, Advanced Robotics, and Competition Prep tracks.
- [Projects](/projects): CubeSat satellites, humanoid robots, smart homes, and flying machines.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach out about enrollment, fees, and group discounts.
